interpretation: CRD vocabulary covers 39.6% of available kinds across 8 workloads spanning 8 domains. Logarithmic saturation (R²=0.868) indicates compositional completeness: early workloads discover most kinds, later workloads reuse existing vocabulary. Specification sparsity ratio: 20:1.
caveats: N=1 builder: all workloads designed by same person
No formal proof of completeness; empirical coverage only
